hero.subtitle: Welcome to the team that's rewriting global e-commerce.
hero.microcopy: At EXPANDO we don't just ship boxes. We help local brands conquer the world. And now you're part of that — as {{role}} on the {{team}} team.

dna.title: This is our DNA
dna.intro: Picture a Czech shoemaker. Great product, only sells locally.

steps.title: We plug them in
steps.description: We onboard them to Amazon, Kaufland, eBay, Allegro. Sync products through EXPANDO APP — our own tech.

steps.title: We translate the world
steps.description: Listings in 5+ languages, logistics (FBA/FBM), PPC campaigns, customer support in each local language.

steps.title: And they break through
steps.description: From first order to millions in revenue. Our client Podpal: 0 → 12,000 orders in 3 months, now on 9 marketplaces.

clientTypes.label: Resell (EAN)
clientTypes.desc: We help existing brands break through.

tribe.title: Meet the tribe
tribe.subtitle: These are the people you'll spend more time with than your family.
tribe.foundersIntro: In 2016 they founded EXPANDO in Prague — and ten years later brought us into the global top 20% of Amazon agencies.
tribe.yourCircleSubtitle: These two meet you on Day 1.
tribe.restSubtitle: Everyone's read about you — at least on Notion. So glance back.

day1.title: Road to Day 1
day1.scheduleSubtitle: Here's what Monday looks like. Come curious.
day1.miniTask: During the day, notice one thing that surprised you from a client's perspective. We'll unpack it together at the end.

practical.title: How to get here
practical.body: EXPANDO HQ, Prague. 5th floor. Public transit stop 3 min walk. If lost, call your buddy.

practical.title: Parking
practical.body: Company parking in the courtyard (ask reception) or blue-zone street parking.

practical.title: Dress code
practical.body: Business casual. Hoodie and sneakers are fine. Client meetings one level up — your buddy will tell you.

practical.title: What to bring
practical.body: Laptop is on us. Just bring a good mood and something to write with.

practical.title: Coffee & lunch
practical.body: Kitchen has espresso, tea, fruit, sparkling water. Team lunches usually at Dvorek or Manifesto.

practical.title: Home office & vacation
practical.body: HO is flexible, coordinate with your leader. Exact terms are in your contract.

whyCool.title: Why it rocks
whyCool.subtitle: Here's where we are right now.
whyCool.techTitle: What you'll look at every day
whyCool.techSubtitle: Setup happens on Day 1 with your buddy.
whyCool.pullquote: We don't run on approvals — we run on ownership.
whyCool.pullquoteSub: Everyone owns their own pile. We keep each other honest through outcomes, not micro-management.

journey90.title: Your 90 days
journey90.subtitle: A map, not a plan. Detailed weekly tasks come from the Slackbot from Day 1.

months.label: Month 1
months.goal: Find your feet, meet people, understand the client.

months.label: Month 2
months.goal: Do things on your own, take real ownership.

journey90.mapNote: The detailed weekly plan comes from the Slackbot from Day 1. This is just the map. 🗺️

cta.title: Before you arrive, try this
cta.subtitle: Three actions. Tick them off and you won't be a stranger.

items.title: Say hi to your buddy
items.description: Click and say hi to {{buddy}} on Slack. Don't worry — she already knows about you.

items.title: Post 3 things about you in #general
items.description: Once you're in, drop a quick intro in #general. A fun fact, a hobby, and what brings you to EXPANDO.

items.title: See how we live
items.description: Our Instagram and LinkedIn show what's happening around us.

cta.templateText:
Hey everyone! 👋 I'm [name] and from [date] I'll be the new {{role}} on the {{team}} team.

3 things about me:
• [fun fact]
• [hobby]
• [what brings you to EXPANDO]

Can't wait to meet you all!

outro.title: We're excited for you
outro.subtitle: You don't need to have all the answers. Come curious, stay open. We've got you.

easterEgg.title: You found it! 🍕
easterEgg.body: Show this to Nikol on Day 1 — lunch is on her.
